name: Forrest Griffin
winProfile: 3 Elite+ wins, 4 Top-5+ wins, 7 ranked quality wins.
primeWindow: Mauricio Rua I → Mauricio Rua II

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Mauricio Rua II is the final counted loss in the shared elite UFC window.

shortCase: A Rampage title win and defining Shogun upset with major UFC history, balanced by a short reign and three prime stoppage losses.
bestArgument: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz and Rich Franklin.
counterArgument: He never defended the title, was stopped three times during his elite window, and historical importance does not create free points.
whyRankedHere: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz and Rich Franklin.
whyNotHigher: He never defended the title, was stopped three times during his elite window, and historical importance does not create free points.
